title: 続きを/voteで続けて。 • consensus mode の前提を確認します。まず Claude と GLM の live lane を起動できるかを確認し、同時に現在の auth- stale 導線設計を維持したまま continuation 可能かを見ます。 • Ran which glm └ glm not found • Explored └ Read agent-glm-general-reviewer.json, agent-claude-general-reviewer.json ────────────────────────────────────────────────...
summary_text: High-risk findings for treating Happy.app as a complete mobile Kernel control surface: - `High`: open-redirect risk in reauth return path. `returnTo` from query is accepted without same-origin/path validation and then used for redirect/link targets. This can send users to arbitrary URLs after login. [happy-auth-gateway.js](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator/apps/happy-web/src/domain/happy-auth-gateway.js#L5) [auth.js](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator/apps/happy-web/auth/auth.js#L87) [auth.js](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator/apps/happy-web/auth/auth.js#L122) - `High`: service worker cache cleanup is origin-wide and deletes all non-matching cache keys. On shared origins, this can wipe caches owned by other apps/scopes. [sw.js](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator/apps/happy-web/sw.js#L32) - `High`: auth gateway runtime flow is not behavior-tested. Current auth tests only validate pure domain helpers, not DOM/login/redirect/token-persist behavior in `auth/auth.js`. Regressions in real reauth flow can pass CI. [test-auth-gateway.js](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator/apps/happy-web/tests/test-auth-gateway.js#L12) [auth.js](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator/apps/happy-web/auth/auth.js#L71) - `Medium-High`: default deployment shape ships Cloudflare Access path as empty meta, so default runtime is password-only unless external config is injected. That leaves the dual-path design incomplete by default. [index.html](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator/apps/happy-web/index.html#L25) [auth/index.html](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator/apps/happy-web/auth/index.html#L13) - `Medium`: contract tests for view/PWA are string-presence checks only; they do not validate runtime routing, auth gateway transitions, or service worker behavior under real navigation/network states. [test-view-contract.sh](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator/apps/happy-web/tests/test-view-contract.sh#L7) [test-pwa-shell.sh](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator/apps/happy-web/tests/test-pwa-shell.sh#L6) - `Medium`: token acceptance is permissive (`accessToken|authToken|token`, refresh optional) and immediately persisted without stricter payload/schema checks, increasing risk of bad-token persistence loops after backend shape drift. [happy-auth-gateway.js](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator/apps/happy-web/src/domain/happy-auth-gateway.js#L44) [auth.js](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator/apps/happy-web/auth/auth.js#L116) Testing gaps that should be added first: - auth gateway integration test for `auth/auth.js`: login success/failure, token persist, `returnTo` validation, dead-end mode. - SW safety test ensuring cache cleanup does not delete foreign cache namespaces. - end-to-end reauth journey test (`auth stale -> gateway -> return -> sync restored`) on PWA/Safari-equivalent flow.
